mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE REFRESH_TOKEN = #{refreshToken} AND IS_REVOKED = 'N' AND EXPIRES_AT > SYSDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_REFRESH_TOKEN SET IS_REVOKED = 'Y', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_REVOKED = 'N'
UPDATE TB_REFRESH_TOKEN SET IS_REVOKED = 'Y', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REFRESH_TOKEN = #{refreshToken} AND IS_REVOKED = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_REFRESH_TOKEN ( MEMBER_ID, REFRESH_TOKEN, EXPIRES_AT, IS_REVOKED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{refreshToken}, #{expiresAt}, 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
